title: helm Step params
description: Input Contract for the helm Actuator (charter §2.3; ADR-0092). Hand-written — derivation ladder rung 1 (§2.2). mode=template is read-only (renders manifests); mode=apply mutates (helm upgrade --install) and is a MUTATING capability that must sit behind a Gate — compile-enforced (ADR-0092 decision 3b). Targets Helm 4 (dependency-scout: v4.2.3, N-1 v3.21.3).

chart.description: Chart reference: an OCI ref (oci://…, pin by digest — §7.3), a repo chart name (with `repo`), or a local path under the plugin's chart root.

repo.description: Chart repository URL for a non-OCI repo chart (passed as helm --repo; no persistent `helm repo add` state).

version.description: Exact chart version (or digest) to install — pin in production (§7.3). Never a floating tag.

release.description: Helm release name; the template and apply Steps of one Workflow share it (ADR-0092 §3).

mode.description: template: render the manifests that WOULD apply (read-only, the plan-equivalent). apply: `helm upgrade --install` against the release — MUTATING, must be Gated (ADR-0092 §3/§3b).

values.description: Values overlay, rendered as a values file. OPAQUE to Stratt — validated against the chart's own values schema by helm downstream, never typed by this Contract (§1.1).

createNamespace.description: Create the target namespace on apply if absent (helm --create-namespace). template never creates anything.
